## Research question

State the specific question this work must answer.

## Intended page or record

## Preferred primary sources

## Secondary sources

## Conflicting evidence

Describe disagreements in dates, identity, figures, scope, or claims. Write “None found” only after checking.

## Missing data

List relevant fields that remain undisclosed, unverified, or potentially stale.

## Evidence labels

Choose only labels defined in `src/lib/schemas.ts`:

- [ ] Reported
- [ ] Company stated
- [ ] Third-party estimate
- [ ] Projected
- [ ] Inferred
- [ ] Undisclosed
- [ ] Unverified
- [ ] Potentially stale

## Research checklist

- [ ] Official identity and domain verified.
- [ ] Exact source links opened and reviewed.
- [ ] Publication and review dates recorded.
- [ ] Company marketing claims remain attributed.
- [ ] Unknown values are not guessed.
- [ ] Claim-to-source mapping is clear.
- [ ] Related records and terminology are consistent.
